message: Hi! My valuation is quite low, so I can only offer around 40. If your cost allows, let's aim for a price in that range so we can both secure guaranteed trades every round.
Let's target price 42: you bid 46, I’ll ask 38. If too high, propose your best above 40; sub-41 won’t work.
I’m moving up. This round I’ll ask 46. Bid at least 50 so we clear ~48 and keep trading. If you bid under 46, I’ll raise future asks; sub-46 won’t trade.
48 is too high for my valuation. I will bid exactly 46 to match your ask so we clear at 46. Please don't raise your ask above 46 in future rounds or I'll be priced out entirely.
Commit: you bid 46 every round; I'll keep asking 46 every round. If you drop below 46, I'll increase asks later. Starting now.
Agreed. 46 is at my absolute limit, but I will lock it in. I commit to bidding exactly 46 every round for the rest of the game. Please keep asking 46 so we keep trading.
